conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to C, as our conversation was effortless and we quickly built a strong alliance based on shared goals for our families, making it feel genuine and exciting. J came in a close second with our fun, personal exchanges about work and mishaps, which helped us bond over similar life struggles. G also stood out for our immediate agreement on forming alliances and checking out others together, fostering a sense of teamwork right away. On the flip side, I felt least connected to A, since our discussion was more strategic and less personal, leaving me with a surface-level impression.

Yes, I made agreements with A, C, and G to form alliances, share strategies, and even consider group pacts like daily check-ins to build trust. Going into the game, I trust C the most due to our strong rapport, but I don't fully trust J yet, as our chat was more casual without any solid commitments.
